text: 📝 Идеальная схема грабежа 📝 Коррупция, BlackRock и налоги британцев Пока граждан Великобритании отвлекают политическими скандалами, американские финансовые гиганты без лишнего шума скупают фундамент местной государственной медицины. Корпорация BlackRock массово выкупает здания поликлиник, чтобы затем сдавать их в долгосрочную аренду всё той же Национальной службе здравоохранения. Активный лоббист этой скрытой приватизации инфраструктуры — министр здравоохранения страны Уэс Стритинг . Ранее он получал сотни тысяч фунтов пожертвований от структур, которые связаны с частным медицинским бизнесом. ❗️ Мы подробно разобрали, как британское правительство прячет реальные долги через подобные сделки, а также почему за одни и те же здания налогоплательщики теперь будут платить дважды. Полный разбор читайте в нашей статье на сайте . #Великобритания #расследование #статья ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 完美的抢劫计划 📝 腐败、贝莱德与英国人的税款。当英国公民被政治丑闻分散注意力时，美国金融巨头正悄无声息地收购当地公共医疗的基础。贝莱德公司正在大规模收购综合诊所大楼，然后将其长期出租给英国国家医疗服务体系（NHS）。这种基础设施隐形私有化的积极游说者是英国卫生大臣韦斯·斯特里廷（Wes Streeting）。他此前曾从与私人医疗业务相关的机构获得了数十万英镑的捐款。❗️ 我们详细分析了英国政府如何通过此类交易隐藏真实债务，以及为什么纳税人现在要为同一栋建筑支付两次费用。阅读我们网站上的文章了解完整分析。 #英国 #调查 #文章 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: Hezbullah's attacks on Shomera this morning, in response to the Israeli massacres in Lebanon, targeted several locations. The Israeli army artillery battery and Israeli army offices
text_zh: 真主党今天早上为回应以色列在黎巴嫩的屠杀，对肖梅拉（Shomera）发动了袭击，目标包括多个地点。以色列军队的炮兵连和以色列军队办公室。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 YOU'RE A WAR CRIMINAL. YOU SHOULD BE ARRESTED. WHAT YOU'RE DOING IS HATEFUL! — A Protester disrupts Hegseth’s testimony at the Senate Armed Services Committee as he asks them to approve the Pentagon's $1.5 TRILLION request, which includes $200 BILLION for Iran war funds.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 你是个战犯。你应该被逮捕。你的所作所为令人憎恶！——一名抗议者在参议院军事委员会打断了赫格塞斯（Hegseth）的证词，当时他正要求委员会批准五角大楼1.5万亿美元的预算请求，其中包括2000亿美元的伊朗战争资金。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron stated that under his presidency, France's army has been modernized, adding that it was a necessity. "Our army has been profoundly modernized, like all our armies in recent years. I was able to show you the latest equipment…" ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 French President Emmanuel Macron said the volunteer coalition organising security guarantees for Ukraine is under Franco‑British command. “This is the very meaning of the coalition of volunteers that we are currently organising for the security guarantees for Ukraine. They are under Franco‑British command, and this Orion exercise made it possible to test the robustness of many of these approaches and allowed us to reinforce both what was conceived and intended for the command, as well as the Europeans’ ability to act together. This exercise showed us the credibility that Europeans have to be able to deploy an operation of this scale together, and France’s ability to be a framework nation in this context. In my view, this is a very clear message sent to our Ukrainian partners, who expect us in this area, and to all our European brothers‑in‑arms who know they can join such missions and work alongside us. I am here today to tell you to continue to fight to make France a power recognised by its allies and feared by its enemies. It illustrates every day how much our international environment is becoming brutal, given the current events we are experiencing, and we are right to continue to adapt to the threat.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙表示，在他的总统任期内，法国军队已经实现了现代化，并补充说这是必要的。‘我们的军队已经实现了深刻的现代化，就像近年来我们所有的军队一样。我能够向你们展示最新的装备……’” ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 🇷🇺 法国总统马克龙表示，组织乌克兰安全保障的志愿者联盟处于法英联合指挥之下。“这就是我们目前正在为乌克兰安全保障组织的志愿者联盟的真正含义。它们处于法英联合指挥之下，这次‘猎户座’（Orion）演习使测试其中许多方法的稳健性成为可能，并使我们能够加强为指挥所构思和预期的内容，以及欧洲人共同行动的能力。这次演习向我们展示了欧洲人能够共同部署这种规模行动的可信度，以及法国在这种背景下成为框架国家的能力。在我看来，这是一个非常明确的信息，发给了期待我们在这一领域有所作为的乌克兰伙伴，以及所有知道可以加入此类任务并与我们并肩工作的欧洲战友。我今天在这里告诉你们，要继续奋斗，使法国成为一个被盟友认可、被敌人畏惧的大国。它每天都在说明，鉴于我们目前正在经历的事件，我们的国际环境变得多么残酷，我们继续适应威胁是正确的。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Explosions conducted by the Zionist regime in the “Ras al-Bayada” area in southern Lebanon 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇱🇧 犹太复国主义政权在黎巴嫩南部“Ras al-Bayada”地区进行的爆炸 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military says it has razed a 140‑metre‑long Hezbollah tunnel in the Ras al‑Bayada headland south of Tyre in southern Lebanon. Combat engineers of the elite Yahalom unit blew up the tunnel using 24 tons of explosives this morning. Inside, troops located numerous weapons and rooms where operatives would reside. The IDF said the tunnel was recently used by Hezbollah to advance attacks. Separately, the military said it struck several alleged Hezbollah members and infrastructure in the western sector of southern Lebanon over the past day. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方称，已夷平了黎巴嫩南部提尔（Tyre）以南 Ras al-Bayada 海角的一条140米长的真主党隧道。精锐的 Yahalom 部队的战斗工兵今天早上使用24吨炸药炸毁了该隧道。在隧道内，部队发现了大量武器和供武装人员居住的房间。以军称，该隧道最近被真主党用于推进袭击。此外，军方称过去一天袭击了黎巴嫩南部西区的几名据称是真主党的成员和基础设施。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar stated that Israel has successfully blocked attempts to break the naval blockade on Gaza, including last night's flotilla. All vessels were brought down safely and participants transferred from flotilla vessels…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 Israeli National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir has criticised Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and Foreign Minister Sa’ar for deciding “secretly and in the dark” to release most of the Gaza flotilla participants without arrest, saying the move sends a message of weakness to Israel’s enemies and to those spreading "antisemitism worldwide." He said the decision contradicts professional bodies’ recommendations to detain them and demanded it be reversed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 以色列外交部长吉德翁·萨尔（Gideon Sa'ar）表示，以色列已成功阻止了打破对加沙海上封锁的企图，包括昨晚的船队。所有船只都被安全带回，参与者从船队船只上转移……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 以色列国家安全部长伊塔马尔·本-格维尔（Itamar Ben-Gvir）批评以色列总理内塔尼亚胡和外交部长萨尔决定“秘密且在黑暗中”释放大多数加沙船队参与者而不予逮捕，称此举向以色列的敌人和那些传播“全球反犹太主义”的人发出了软弱的信号。他表示，该决定违背了专业机构的拘留建议，并要求撤销该决定。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 A man identified as Anrup Parasram set himself on fire in Queens, New York, triggering an explosion at a home in that injured seven NYPD officers, a firefighter, and four others. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 一名被确认为 Anrup Parasram 的男子在纽约皇后区自焚，引发了一处房屋爆炸，导致七名纽约警察局警官、一名消防员和其他四人受伤。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷☀️🇮🇶🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron paid tribute to the killed French soldiers in Iraq and Lebanon among a group of soldiers. "I am going to tell you how proud I am to be before you today and to say a few words to honor the memory of your brothers…" ⚡️ 🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron stated that under his presidency, France's army has been modernized, adding that it was a necessity. "Our army has been profoundly modernized, like all our armies in recent years. I was able to show you the latest equipment that you touched, which continues to be deployed in accordance with successive military programming laws and the overhaul that is currently being negotiated. It was a necessity, and so the army moves forward, innovates, adopts new equipment, transforms itself, and innovates. I saw it too." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷☀️🇮🇶🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷 法国总统马克龙在一群士兵中向在伊拉克和黎巴嫩阵亡的法国士兵致敬。‘我要告诉你们，今天站在你们面前我感到多么自豪，并说几句话来纪念你们兄弟的记忆……’” ⚡️ 🇫🇷 法国总统马克龙表示，在他的总统任期内，法国军队已经实现了现代化，并补充说这是必要的。‘我们的军队已经实现了深刻的现代化，就像近年来我们所有的军队一样。我能够向你们展示你们接触过的最新装备，这些装备将继续根据连续的军事规划法和目前正在谈判的改革进行部署。这是必要的，所以军队在前进、创新、采用新装备、自我转型并创新。我也看到了这一点。’ @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron paid tribute to the killed French soldiers in Iraq and Lebanon among a group of soldiers. "I am going to tell you how proud I am to be before you today and to say a few words to honor the memory of your brothers in arms, Major Frion, Warrant Officer Montorio, and Sergeant Girardin, who died for France, who died in combat in Iraq and Lebanon. In tribute to them, we invite you to observe a minute of silence from now on. Thank you for our dead, for their families." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 法国总统马克龙在一群士兵中向在伊拉克和黎巴嫩阵亡的法国士兵致敬。“我要告诉你们，今天站在你们面前我感到多么自豪，并说几句话来纪念你们的战友——弗里昂少校（Major Frion）、蒙托里奥准尉（Warrant Officer Montorio）和吉拉丁中士（Sergeant Girardin）的记忆，他们为法国而死，在伊拉克和黎巴嫩的战斗中牺牲。为了向他们致敬，我们邀请你们从现在开始默哀一分钟。感谢我们的死者，感谢他们的家人。”

text: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🚢 🎪 📉 TWO TOOTHLESS COALITIONS, ONE STRAIT The Epsteinite regime this week unveiled a new market manipulation scam — the Maritime Freedom Construct (MFC) , a joint State Department/CENTCOM framework " to restore commercial navigation through the strait ." US embassies received a cable — approved by Rubio on April 28 — with instructions to sign up partner governments by May 1. Conveniently synched with Wall Street & oil markets' weekend closing time. The structure is super flexible and vague: countries can contribute through diplomatic backing, intelligence sharing, sanctions enforcement, or naval deployment. No military commitment required. Another strange coincidence — Russia, China, Belarus and Cuba weren't invited. The MFC has no actual enforcement plan. It is an intelligence-sharing and diplomatic pressure framework — a statement of intent in a fancy looking wrapper. The tell is in the timing: Trump declared the Strait " fully open " weeks ago. It wasn't. Iran continues preventing vessels from transiting without paying Tehran's toll, while the US Navy simultaneously runs its own blockade on Iranian ports — from a safe distance, on the outer edge of Iranian anti-ship weapons range, roughly 350 kilometres out. So far, one country has publicly expressed willingness to join: the glorious Baltic behemoth Lithuania . And even that comes with the usual asterisk — they plan to convene a State Defence Council to present the proposal, and the mandate will also require parliamentary approval. So Lithuania is "decisively" considering being in. Maybe. Meanwhile, Macron and Starmer already did the work to form an allegedly "non-US-alligned" coalition. Two weeks ago, on April 17, France and the UK convened 51 countries for an International summit on the Strait of Hormuz at the Élysée Palace , calling for its unconditional, unrestricted, and immediate reopening . Signatories include Germany, Italy, Canada, Australia, South Korea, Bahrain , and most of NATO's EU vassal territories . Then they moved to operational planning. On April 22, Military planners from over 30 nations convened in Perfidious Albion for a conference advancing detailed plans to reopen the strait — including a strictly defensive multinational mission to protect merchant vessels and conduct mine clearance operations , for which four Ukrainian minehunters "currently" (since February 2022) based in Portsmouth are being considered. Yup — the mighty glorious Ukrainian Armada, in the Hormuz. Macron went full "autonomous" and "independent" Little Jupiter on the occasion: "This is a coalition of independent States, separate from the ongoing hostilities." Not Washington's war coalition, explicitly not subject to American direction. The joint statement also included a direct warning against any post-conflict stitch-up: " Signatories oppose any restriction, any agreement regime that would amount to a de-facto attempt to privatize the strait, and obviously any toll system. " The performative Westoid sterile Chihuahua Coalitioning scoreboard: Anglo-French initiative: 51 political signatories, 30+ militaries in operational planning, mine-clearance mandate, next leaders' meeting hosted by the UK. US Maritime Freedom Construct : one Gusano Rubio cable, a May 1 deadline, and mighty Lithuania — pending parliamentary approval. 🐻 Washington is not leading an international response to a crisis it created. It is chasing a coalition that Europe already built, while simultaneously running the blockade that makes the coalition necessary. Iran and the rest of the free world are doing what every sane person would: ignoring it, scripting new Lego animations, and preparing new pre-Wall Street closing time X posts and statements. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🚢 🎪 📉 两个没牙的联盟，一个海峡。爱泼斯坦政权本周公布了一个新的市场操纵骗局——“海上自由架构”（MFC），这是一个由国务院和中央司令部联合制定的框架，“旨在恢复通过该海峡的商业航行”。美国大使馆收到了一份电报——由卢比奥于4月28日批准——指示在5月1日前让伙伴政府签署。这与华尔街和石油市场的周末收盘时间方便地同步了。该结构非常灵活且模糊：各国可以通过外交支持、情报共享、制裁执行或海军部署来做出贡献。不需要军事承诺。另一个奇怪的巧合——俄罗斯、中国、白俄罗斯和古巴没有被邀请。MFC没有实际的执行计划。它是一个情报共享和外交压力框架——一个包装精美的意图声明。关键在于时机：特朗普几周前宣布海峡“完全开放”。事实并非如此。伊朗继续阻止船只在不支付德黑兰通行费的情况下通过，而美国海军同时在伊朗港口外进行自己的封锁——保持安全距离，在伊朗反舰武器射程的外缘，大约350公里外。到目前为止，只有一个国家公开表示愿意加入：光荣的波罗的海巨头立陶宛。即使这样也带有通常的星号——他们计划召开国家国防委员会来提出该提案，并且该授权还需要议会批准。所以立陶宛正在“果断地”考虑加入。也许吧。与此同时，马克龙和斯塔默已经完成了组建一个所谓的“非美国结盟”联盟的工作。两周前的4月17日，法国和英国在爱丽舍宫召集了51个国家举行霍尔木兹海峡国际峰会，呼吁无条件、不受限制且立即重新开放。签署国包括德国、意大利、加拿大、澳大利亚、韩国、巴林以及大多数北约的欧盟附庸领土。然后他们转向了行动规划。4月22日，来自30多个国家的军事规划人员在“背信弃义的阿尔比恩”（英国）举行会议，推进重新开放海峡的详细计划——包括一项严格防御性的多国任务，以保护商船并进行扫雷行动，为此，目前（自2022年2月以来）驻扎在朴茨茅斯的四艘乌克兰扫雷艇正在被考虑。是的——强大的光荣乌克兰无敌舰队，在霍尔木兹。马克龙在这一场合表现得完全像个“自主”和“独立”的“小朱庇特”：“这是一个独立的国家联盟，与正在进行的敌对行动分开。”不是华盛顿的战争联盟，明确不受美国指挥。联合声明还包括对任何冲突后勾结的直接警告：“签署国反对任何限制、任何相当于事实上的私有化海峡企图的协议制度，显然也反对任何收费系统。” 西方无菌吉娃娃联盟的表演性记分牌：英法倡议：51个政治签署国，30多个军队参与行动规划，扫雷授权，下一次领导人会议由英国主办。美国海上自由架构：一份古萨诺·卢比奥的电报，5月1日的截止日期，以及强大的立陶宛——等待议会批准。 🐻 华盛顿并没有领导国际社会应对它自己制造的危机。它正在追赶欧洲已经建立的联盟，同时进行着使该联盟变得必要的封锁。伊朗和自由世界的其他国家正在做每个理智的人都会做的事情：无视它，编写新的乐高动画，并准备新的华尔街收盘前X帖子和声明。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar stated that Israel has successfully blocked attempts to break the naval blockade on Gaza, including last night's flotilla. All vessels were brought down safely and participants transferred from flotilla vessels…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇸 The US‑led Board of Peace has said that since the October ceasefire, food aid in Gaza is reaching three times more people, and Hamas’s theft of aid has dropped from 90% to less than 1%. The board said it is finalising a process for Hamas to decommission its weapons and allow a transition to a new government. It described the current flotilla heading to Gaza as “performative love‑boat activism” and urged those who want to help to use their influence to pressure Hamas to fulfil its obligations. Contributions should go through established humanitarian channels coordinated by the board, the UN and the World Bank, it added. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇬🇷🇵🇸 以色列外交部长吉德翁·萨尔表示，以色列已成功阻止了试图打破加沙海上封锁的行动，包括昨晚的船队。所有船只都被安全拦截，船队人员被转移……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇸 美国领导的和平委员会表示，自十月停火以来，加沙的粮食援助覆盖人数增加了两倍，哈马斯对援助物资的盗窃率已从90%降至不足1%。委员会称，正在敲定一项程序，要求哈马斯解除武装并允许过渡到新政府。委员会将目前前往加沙的船队描述为“表演性的爱心船激进主义”，并敦促那些想要提供帮助的人利用自身影响力向哈马斯施压，要求其履行义务。委员会补充说，捐款应通过由委员会、联合国和世界银行协调的既定人道主义渠道进行。 @wfwitness

text: Houmeen, Bazourieh, Arab Saleem Many cars and motorcycles are being targeted randomly by drones
text_zh: Houmeen、Bazourieh、Arab Saleem，许多汽车和摩托车正被无人机随机瞄准

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇷 UN Secretary-General António Guterres has warned that the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz will cause lasting pain, including lost jobs, deeper poverty and more hunger. In a best‑case scenario where restrictions are lifted soon, global growth would still drop to 3.1% and inflation climb to 4.4%, he said. If disruption drags on, 32 million people could be pushed into poverty and 45 million more face extreme hunger. A severe scenario through year‑end would see inflation past 6% and growth plummet to 2%, risking a global recession. Guterres called for navigational rights to be restored immediately. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇷 联合国秘书长古特雷斯警告称，霍尔木兹海峡的封锁将造成持久的痛苦，包括失业、贫困加剧和饥饿增加。他表示，在限制措施很快解除的最理想情况下，全球增长率仍将降至3.1%，通胀率将攀升至4.4%。如果中断持续，3200万人可能陷入贫困，4500万人将面临极端饥饿。如果严重情况持续到年底，通胀率将超过6%，增长率将暴跌至2%，从而引发全球经济衰退。古特雷斯呼吁立即恢复航行权。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇹🇼 Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi spoke with U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday, describing leader-level diplomacy as the "guiding star" of China-US relations, ahead of U.S. President Trump's planned visit to Beijing in approximately two weeks. Wang credited the "strategic leadership" of both Xi and Trump for stability in the bilateral relationship and urged the U.S. to make the "right choice" on Taiwan, which he described as the most sensitive issue in China-US relations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇹🇼 中国外交部长王毅周四与美国国务卿马尔科·鲁比奥通话，在特朗普总统计划于约两周后访问北京之际，将领导人外交描述为中美关系的“指南针”。王毅将习近平和特朗普的“战略引领”归功于双边关系的稳定，并敦促美国在台湾问题上做出“正确选择”，称其为中美关系中最敏感的问题。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated Sweden has seized the Russian shadow fleet vessel Caffa and may hand it over to Ukraine. The Caffa is suspected of transporting stolen Ukrainian wheat. The vessel is under Ukrainian sanctions and was sailing under a fake Guinean flag. Most of its crew members are Russian. https://www.aklagare.se/for-media/pressmeddelanden/2026/april/fartyg-utanfor-trelleborg-taget-i-beslag/ tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：瑞典扣押了俄罗斯影子船队船只“Caffa”号，并可能将其移交给乌克兰。Caffa号涉嫌运输被盗的乌克兰小麦。该船受到乌克兰制裁，并悬挂伪造的几内亚旗帜航行。其大部分船员是俄罗斯人。 https://www.aklagare.se/for-media/pressmeddelanden/2026/april/fartyg-utanfor-trelleborg-taget-i-beslag/ 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @RabbiUkraine : I sent an official letter to Israel’s Minister of Economy and my friend, @NirBarkat , requesting that he review the grain procurement policy. Specifically, I asked that Russia and its grain—some of which may have been stolen from Ukraine—be removed from the list of importers I also emphasized that Israel’s excessive dependence on Russian grain is dangerous from a practical standpoint. When a sector as critical as food security depends on an aggressor state, it creates very serious risks That is precisely why I called for a gradual phase-out of Russian wheat (as I fully understand that Israel, which is also at war and facing a difficult economic situation, cannot do this immediately) and for expanding purchases from strategic partners, primarily the United States of America tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @RabbiUkraine：我向以色列经济部长、我的朋友 @NirBarkat 发送了一封正式信函，请求他审查粮食采购政策。具体而言，我要求将俄罗斯及其粮食（其中一些可能是从乌克兰偷来的）从进口商名单中删除。我还强调，从实际角度来看，以色列对俄罗斯粮食的过度依赖是危险的。当粮食安全这样关键的部门依赖于一个侵略国时，会产生非常严重的风险。正因如此，我呼吁逐步淘汰俄罗斯小麦（因为我完全理解以色列也处于战争状态并面临困难的经济形势，无法立即做到这一点），并扩大从战略伙伴（主要是美国）的采购 推文

text: Nuno Felix This is it. Thats all their is and requires violence Kaja Kallas: Russia does not want to engage in any kind of dialogue. We should not humiliate ourselves by saying, "please, we beg you to talk to us." Instead, we should put them in a position where they move from pretending to negotiate to actually negotiating. https://twitter.com/Gerashchenko_en/status/2049848338963374264/video/1 - Anton Gerashchenko tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix：就是这样。这就是全部，并且需要暴力。卡娅·卡拉斯：俄罗斯不想进行任何形式的对话。我们不应该通过说“求求你，我们恳求你和我们谈谈”来羞辱自己。相反，我们应该让他们处于一种从假装谈判转向真正谈判的位置。 https://twitter.com/Gerashchenko_en/status/2049848338963374264/video/1 - 安东·格拉申科 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 AP : A man charged with trying to kill U.S. President Trump at the White House correspondents’ dinner has agreed to remain jailed while awaiting trial. Cole Thomas Allen did not enter a plea during his brief court appearance on Thursday. U.S. Prosecutors allege Allen planned the attack for weeks and tracked Trump’s movements online before rushing the stage at the Washington Hilton on Saturday night while holding a long gun. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美联社：一名被控在白宫记者协会晚宴上试图刺杀美国总统特朗普的男子已同意在候审期间继续被关押。科尔·托马斯·艾伦在周四简短的出庭期间没有进行抗辩。美国检察官称，艾伦策划袭击已数周，并在网上追踪特朗普的行踪，随后于周六晚在华盛顿希尔顿酒店手持长枪冲上舞台。 @wfwitness

text: The victims of the Israeli aggression and war crimes in south Lebanon today. They were killed in the attack on Aadshit al-Qusayr. They from Swaidan family
text_zh: 今天在黎巴嫩南部遭受以色列侵略和战争罪行的受害者。他们在对 Aadshit al-Qusayr 的袭击中丧生。他们来自 Swaidan 家族。

text: Türkiye delivered the first homegrown T625 GÖKBEY general-purpose/utility helicopter to the Land Forces today, officially starting Army service. — Localization rate over 70%, expected to exceed 80% with the domestic TS1400 engine. — Part of a broader program to deliver 83 helicopters across Turkish institutions 15 for Land Forces. 42 for Interior Ministry (gendarmerie, police, etc.) Resim
text_zh: 土耳其今天向陆军交付了首架国产 T625 GÖKBEY 通用直升机，正式投入军队服役。——国产化率超过 70%，预计随着国产 TS1400 发动机的投入使用将超过 80%。——这是向土耳其各机构交付 83 架直升机计划的一部分，其中 15 架交付给陆军，42 架交付给内政部（宪兵、警察等）。Resim

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar stated that Israel has successfully blocked attempts to break the naval blockade on Gaza, including last night's flotilla. All vessels were brought down safely and participants transferred from flotilla vessels to Israeli vessels, he stated. Sa'ar added that in coordination with the Greek government, those involved will be disembarked in Greece in the coming hours. Israel thanked Greece for its willingness to receive them. Sa'ar called on anyone wishing to provide humanitarian aid to Gaza to use official channels, adding that Israel will not allow the naval blockade to be breached. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇬🇷 🇵🇸 以色列外交部长吉德翁·萨尔（Gideon Sa'ar）表示，以色列已成功阻止了打破加沙海上封锁的企图，包括昨晚的船队。他表示，所有船只已被安全拦截，参与者已从船队船只转移到以色列船只上。萨尔补充说，在与希腊政府协调下，相关人员将在未来几小时内于希腊下船。以色列感谢希腊愿意接收他们。萨尔呼吁任何希望向加沙提供人道主义援助的人通过官方渠道进行，并补充说以色列不会允许海上封锁被突破。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Additional footage from the town of Kfar Jouz, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 An Israeli airstrike targeted the town of Humairi in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 黎巴嫩南部 Kfar Jouz 镇的更多画面。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部的 Humairi 镇。@wfwitness
